NCT-05489231.text:
NCT-05489231.
The trial enrolled 648 participants across 42 sites in 9 countries. Eligible patients were aged 18-75 years with
biopsy-confirmed Stage III or IV pulmonary sarcoidosis and a FVC (forced vital capacity) between 40% and 80%
predicted. Participants were randomized 1:1 to Veratralimab 300mg IV every 4 weeks or placebo, with both arms
receiving standard of care including corticosteroids
